ai_summary: Here's the executive summary:  Deepak Nitrite Limited (DNL) has executed an internal financing transaction where its wholly-owned subsidiary, Deepak Chem Tech Limited (DCTL), received a ₹120 Crore capital infusion from another DNL subsidiary, Deepak Phenolics Limited (DPL), via 9% Optionally Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares. This related-party transaction, conducted at par and stated to be "arms length," strengthens DCTL's capital base to fund ongoing projects and general corporate purposes. The material impact is an internal reallocation of funds within the DNL group to support a growing, capital-intensive subsidiary, with no immediate red flags beyond DCTL's relatively nascent revenue generation compared to its substantial capital investments.
